data.title: 'Very own co-president' Musk could launch his stablecoin, Maxine Waters claims
data.description:
Democrat Maxine Waters claimed that Elon Musk and companies like Walmart, Amazon, and Facebook could launch their stablecoins if the STABLE bill is passed in its current form.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/very-own-co-president-musk-could-launch-his-stablecoin-maxine-waters-claims

data.title: Hong Kong court filings show Justin Sun bailed out TUSD stablecoin issuer after losing $450M reserves
data.description:
According to a Hong Kong court filings, Justin Sun stepped in to bail out Techteryx’s TrueUSD (TUSD) stablecoin after it saw nearly half a billion dollars of its reserves rendered illiquid. The issue started after Techteryx acquired TrueUSD from TrueCoin in December 2020. After the acquisition, Techteryx appointed First Digital Trust (FDT), a Hong Kong-based […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/justin-sun-bailed-out-tusd-after-losing-450m/

data.title: Pump.fun launches lending platform to finance memecoin buys
data.description:
Pump. fun is launching a lending platform to enable users to buy memecoins and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) with borrowed cryptocurrency, the Solana-based memecoin launchpad said.  Dubbed Pump. Fi, the onchain lending protocol provides “immediate… financing for [any] digital asset,” Pump
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pump-fun-launches-defi-lender-finance-memecoin-buys?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Chainlink Holds $13 Support Again, Bulls Defend Key Level
data.description:
Chainlink (LINK) has once again maintained its key support level despite ongoing market volatility. It faced repeated tests at this price, yet buyers continue to hold firm. Investors and analysts are closely watching whether the token can sustain this level and begin an upward movement
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/02/chainlink-holds-13-support-again-bulls-defend-key-level/

data.title: TikTok bid submitted by OnlyFans founder’s startup and crypto foundation behind Hedera: Reuters
data.description:
The "intent" to bid on TikTok was sent to the White House and U. S. President Donald Trump this week, the report said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349330/tiktok-bid-submitted-by-onlyfans-founders-startup-and-crypto-foundation-behind-hedera-reuters?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance-Backed FDUSD Stablecoin Loses Dollar Peg Following Justin Sun Accusations
data.description:
A stablecoin called First Digital USD lost its dollar peg after Tron founder Justin Sun claimed that its issuer is effectively insolvent.
source: https://decrypt.co/312984/fdusd-stablecoin-loses-dollar-peg-justin-sun

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) volatility matches the moves of S&P 500 for the past month
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) moved in line with the S&P stock index, tracking even daily movements. The leading coin has turned into a proxy for the US economy and is seen as a potential signal for a stock market reversal.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-volatility-match-the-move-of-sp-500/

data.title: Grayscale Debuts More Bitcoin ETFs—With a Twist
data.description:
Two new funds will use covered call strategies that allow holders to buy equity shares they already own at a given price.
source: https://decrypt.co/312857/grayscale-debuts-bitcoin-etfs-exposure-to-btc-movement
